title: もしもその身が自由なら

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing research in the library when a random
article catches my eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Is Sirius Symboli Avoiding the Track?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pull it out and begin reading. It chronicles Sirius
Symboli's career prior to enrolling at Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Her father is a passionate teacher and leader in
the URA, and the training club she's affiliated
with has produced many exceptional runners."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"These two pillars pulled Sirius's education in
opposite directions and may be the reason
behind her taking a leave of absence from
racing."

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: What's that you're so invested in?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hey, cool it with the terrified reaction. What are
you reading that's so stimulating, hm?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sob... Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I... I just don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A younger Umamusume who I assume is one of
Sirius Symboli's mentees comes running up to us
in tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells us how her sickly mother recently
collapsed and is in the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
The hospital she's at is in my hometown, but it's
really far away. It takes half a day just to get
there...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But I... I have a race tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Okay. So, what do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I want to compete, but I also want to visit my
mom. This really isn't the time to be racing,
though...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You know the proverb, "If you run after two
hares, you will catch neither"?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's another idiom about killing two
birds with one stone. You're smart enough to see
what I'm getting at here, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
That's your answer. You decide what it is you
want.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Seize what you desire. Give in to your hunger. Go
after both.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You came to me for advice because that's the
kind of Umamusume you want to become, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
If it's too much to do on your own, I'll lend a
hand.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
If you want to see your mom but don't think you
can handle the post-race proceedings or if you
need to stay out overnight, just tell me.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I'll make up some cover story and shake people
off your tail.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sirius! You'd... You'd really do that for me?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hmph. You think I'd go back on my word?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No, of course not! I'll think hard about what I
want to do... I'd better talk things over with my
mom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The younger Umamusume leaves in a better
mood.
choice_data_list:
You're such a good mentor to the younger
students.

You're such a good mentor to the younger
students.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Not really. She's the one who came to me for
advice. I just gave her my two cents.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's best for people to make their own
decisions about their life.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
She's not a kid. I'm sure she'll figure out what to
do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words make me think about that article
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure, her leave of absence happened in the past,
but I'd assumed that was something she was
forced to do.
choice_data_list:
(But to her, maybe the value of making her own
choices lies in...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I cut my thought short. After all, it's her decision
to choose how she wants to live.
